title: Modded Adventure (Fabric 1.20.1)
description: A cool modded modpack for playing with your friends
body:
# Modded Adventure
## About
### Introduction
A simple modpack for playing with your friends.

Modded Adventure is a performant modpack (based on Adrenaline) featuring a lot of technology with some other features, notably world generation.

> I'm not a professional modpack developer and this is an amateur work for our server.
### FAQ
#### Q: Are you still working on this?
**A:** As of `February 23rd, 2024` I plan on making a new, simpler modpack. You're free to modify / redistribute this modpack.
#### Q: Will it be available for other versions?
**A:** We may upgrade this modpack when Minecraft 1.21 is relased, but I do not plan on backporting it to older versions.  
*Update 1: Won't be upgrading to 1.20.2 since I'm lazy*  
*Update 2: Since Mojang seems to be making 1.21 worse and worse we probably won't upgrade.*  
#### Q: Will it be available for Forge?
**A:**
1. Never, Forge is getting too old. Fabric is the future.
2. I don't like Optifine
3. Forge modpacks are hard to make
### Future versions
#### 1.2
~~Probably ComputerCraft, client tweaks, optimisation.~~
*Update: 1.2 relased but changelog isn't available yet.*
#### Later
- Fixing the modpack (some mods are actually unused)
- Improve modpack (questbook)
- Fix stuff that doesn't work
## Features (mods)
### Technology
- **Ad Astra** Explore space
  - **Ad Astra: Giselle addon** Additional features
- **Alloy forgery** Forge alloys
- **Applied Energetics 2** Advanced storage
  - **Applied Energetics 2 Wireless Terminals** Wireless access
  - **ME Requester** Automatic storage
- **Better Furnaces Reforged** More furnaces
- **Create -> Create Fabric** Advanced technology mod
  - **Create Big Cannons** Build cannons with Create
  - **Create Crafts and Additions** Create & Electricity
  - **Create Jetpack** Jetpack based on Create's backtanks
  - **Create Ore Excavation** Infinite ores with Create
  - **Create Slice and Dice** Automate **Farmer's Delight**
  - **Create Utilities** Various Create utilities
  - **Create: Extended Cogwheels** More cogwheel variants
  - **Create: Garnished** Create & Food
  - **Create: Steam 'n' Rails** Create's trains overhaul
  - **Create: Structures** Naturally generated Create structures
  - **`Ressource Pack` Created Applied Energetics** Create look for **Applied Energetics 2**
- **Expanded Storage** More storage
- **Extractinator** Make bullsh*t more useful
- **Farmer's Delight** More plants and foods
  - **Farmer's Knives** More knives
- **Modern Industrialization** Modern technology mod
  - **Modern Dynamics** Modern item and fluid pipes
- **Powah** Store and generate energy
- **Trash Cans** Void
- **Valkyrien Skies** Realistic ship physics
  - **Eureka** Balloons and ships
### Building, decoration
- **Chipped** More blocks variants
- **Comfort** Sleeping bags
- **Handcrafted** More decoration blocks
- **Rechiseled** Block variants
  - **Rechiseled: Create** Create blocks variants
- **Supplementaries** Vanilla ++
### World generation
- **Better End** End overhaul
- **Better Nether** Nether overhaul
- **ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village** Village overhaul
- **Deeper and Darker** Deep dark overhaul
- **Dungeons and Taverns** Add new structures
- **Explorify** New structures
- **Repurposed Structures** Better vanilla structures
- **`Data Pack` Tectonic** Better terrain shape
- **Terralith** Even better 1.18+ world generation
- **Terrestria** More biomes
- **Towns and Towers** Better villages / pillages
- **When Dungeons Arise** Super dungeons
- ***YUNG's mods***
  - **Better Desert Temples** Better desert temples
  - **Better Dungeons** Better dungeons
  - **Better End Island** Better end island
  - **Better Jungle Temples** Better jungle temples
  - **Better Mineshafts** Better mineshafts
  - **Better Nether Forteresses** Better nether forteresses
  - **Better Ocean Monuments** Better ocean monuments
  - **Better Strongholds** Better strongholds
  - **Better Witch Huts** Better witch huts
  - **Bridges** Random bridges in the world
  - **Extras** Various world gen features
### Misc
- **Friends&Foes** Bring all mob vote mobs into the game
- **Mob Captains** Powerful captain mobs
- **Traveler's Backpack** Backpacks
- **Waystones** Waystones
- **Wilder Wild** Better wild update
### Client tweaks
- **Advancement plaques** Cool advancements
- **AppleSkin** See more informations about food
- **`Ressource Pack` Chat Reporting Helper** Tells you how chat reporting works
- **`Ressource Pack` Default Dark Mode** Dark mode for Minecraft's GUIs
- **Do a barrel roll** Better elytra flying experience
- **Double doors** Open double doors in one click
- **EMI** JEI-like item list
  - **EMI Addon: Extra Mod Integration** Various EMI integrations
  - **EMI Loot** Mobs loot support
  - **EMI Trades** Villagers trades support
  - **EMIffect** Effects descriptions
- **Elytra Slot** Specific elytra slot
- **`Ressource Pack` Fullbright UB** Fullbright
- **`Ressource Pack` Icons** Icons
- **Jade** What Am I Looking At
  - **Jade Addons** Various mods integrations
  - **Your Reputation** Villager reputation
- **JourneyMap** Mini- and fullscreen-map addon
  - **JourneyMap Integration** Various mods integrations
  - **JourneyPAC** Display **Open Parties and Claims** claims
  - **MapFrontiers** Regions
- **MixinTrace** Mixins in crash reports
- **Polymorph** Choose a crafting recipe
- **`Ressource Pack` Reimagined GUI (Dark)** Another dark GUI ressource pack
- **`Ressource Pack` Subtly Glowing Ores** Glowing ore blocks
- **Trinkets** More armor slots
- **Villager names** Give names to villagers
- **Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)** Options.txt tweaks
### Multiplayer
- **EasyAuth** Login and register
- **Open Parties and Claims** Parties and claims
  - **Create Support for Open Parties and Claims** Create & OpenPAC
- **Village Spawn Point** Set server spawn in a village
### Optimisation
- **ModernFix** Fix various bugs
- **Thread Tweak** Tweak CPU scheduling
#### Server
- **Alternate Current** Faster redstone
- **Lithium** Various server optimisations
#### Client
- **Dynamic FPS** Better background performance
- **Enhanced Block Entities** Better block entities performance
- **Entity Culling** Cull entities
- **`Ressource Pack` Fast Better Grass** Better grass blocks textures
- **Ferrite Core** Memory usage optimisation
- **Immediately Fast** Faster rendering
- **Sodium** Powerful optimisation mod
  - **Indium** Fabric's rendering API for Sodium
### Libraries
- **Architectury API**
- **Athena**
- **BCLib**
- **Balm**
- **Botarium**
- **Cardinal Components API**
- **Cloth Config API**
- **Collective**
- **Cristel Lib**
- **Fabric API**
- **Fabric Language Kotlin**
- **Factory API**
- **Forge Config API Port**
- **Fusion (Connected Textures)**
- **Iceberg**
- **MidnightLib**
- **Moonlight Lib**
- **Porting Lib**
- **Prism**
- **Ressourceful Lib**
  - **Ressourceful Config**
- **SuperMartijn642's Core Lib**
  - **SuperMartijn642's Config Lib**
- **Yet Another Config Lib**
- **owo (owo-lib)**
